Downloads

Get Loom

All Loom apps are free, open source, and install with a single executable. No accounts required.

Suite Installer Concept

Build your Loom bundle.

Select the apps you want and generate a single installer that sets up your entire Loom suite. Only Macro is available now — others will unlock as they ship.

1 app selected~8 MB total
Individual Apps

Download by app.

M

Loom Macro

v1.0.0

Node-based macro scripting for Windows.

Windows · ~8MB
S

System Requirements

OS

Windows 10 version 1903 or later, Windows 11

Arch

x64 (AMD64) · ARM64 (coming soon)

RAM

4 GB minimum, 8 GB recommended

Storage

50 MB per app (data stored separately)

Internet

Not required — fully offline capable

Rights

Standard user — no admin required

LOOM

A suite of offline-first desktop utilities for Windows. Your data lives on your machine.

Apps

Platform

Windows 10 / 11 x64 & ARM64 Offline first No accounts
